project.name: StackFire
project.description: StackFire is a community membership asset formed through HACD Stack, giving each holder a verifiable PoW-backed formation record.

asset.utility_summary: Each SFR unit represents one share of a community membership slot formed through a HACD Stack lot. Holders can use SFR for community governance participation (planned) and access gated community resources.

copy.headline: Community membership, formed through HACD.
copy.subheadline: StackFire issues SFR — a community Stack Asset with a visible PoW formation cost and hard-capped supply.
copy.short_description: SFR is formed across 100 HACD lots at 50 HAC each. Total supply is 1,000,000 SFR. No inflation. No hidden allocation. Formed on-chain.
copy.risk_disclosure: SFR is a community Stack Asset, not an investment product. No price, liquidity, listing, or return is guaranteed. Future utility features depend on development. Formation cost is non-refundable. This is a draft structure pending HACD Labs review.

notes: Test project generated by HACD Incubator AI Issuance Skill.
All parameters marked as draft. Issuer confirmation required before Launchpad publication.
Governance utility is planned only — must not be promised in public copy.
Maximum 10 HACD per participant must be enforced at Launchpad level.
